scripts.dev:health: sh -c 'curl -fsS http://localhost:4000 >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8001/docs >/dev/null && echo "Koaryu is up on 4000/8001"'
scripts.check:recovery-tooling: sh -c 'command -v gpg >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "GnuPG is required for recovery-tooling checks" >&2; exit 1; }' && python3 scripts/recovery-tooling.test.py && bash -n scripts/download-offsite-backup.sh && sh -c 'if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck scripts/download-offsite-backup.sh; else echo "shellcheck unavailable; bash syntax and fixture tests passed"; fi'
